-class Logger:

-    def __init__(self, filename):

-        self.terminal.write(message)

-        self.log.write(message)

-        self.log.flush()

-    def flush(self):

-        self.terminal.flush()

-        self.log.flush()

+# Write metrics to file, suppress stdout spam

-

-NUM_WORKERS = 2

+NUM_WORKERS = 0  # critical: avoid segfault from multiprocessing

+

     sys.exit(1)

+    # Save best model
